ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-30-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-20-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, DENISSE $2,267.00 PRINCIPAL, $167.07 INTEREST, $160.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,594.37, SEE SCANNED DOC
